message:
feat(storage): add cursor-based event streaming for deterministic replay

Introduces get_events_stream() and query_events_stream() for paginated,
cursor-based event queries supporting deterministic replay and resume
from checkpoint IDs.

- EventStreamQuery struct with filters: pane_id, rule_id, event_type,
  triage_state, label, time range (since/until), unhandled_only flag
- Dynamic SQL construction with parameterized queries ordered by
  ascending ID for deterministic ordering
- Label filtering via subquery join on event_labels table
- Pagination via after_id (exclusive) + limit (default 100)
- Test covering pagination and cursor-based resume workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
